title: Everything You Need to Know About Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator based in Nigeria or Ghana, you know the frustration of PayPal holds and Gumroad payout delays. If you're in the Philippines or Pakistan, you've likely dealt with the hassle of USDT settlement speed. And for creators in Kenya, it's the uncertainty of P2P conversions that keeps you up at night. There's a better way to get paid for your digital products – without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. Welcome to the world of crypto payment integration for static sites, where Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) is the key to unlocking seamless transactions with 300+ coins. In this post, we'll break down the technology behind this solution, who it's built for, and how to use it to start taking action.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment integration for static sites is a game-changer for digital creators who've been stifled by traditional payment processors. It allows you to receive cryptocurrency payments directly on your website, without the need for a centralized intermediary like PayPal or Stripe. This means faster settlement times, lower transaction fees, and greater control over your finances. But what does it take to make this happen? In short, it requires a combination of technical expertise, the right tools, and a willingness to adapt to the rapidly evolving world of cryptocurrency payments.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At its core, crypto payment integration involves using Web3 Wallet Connect to generate a multi-chain QR code that buyers can scan to make a payment. This code is linked to your wallet, which is then connected to your static site using a payment gateway like NOWPayments. When a buyer scans the QR code, the payment is processed in real-time, and the funds are deposited into your wallet. From there, you can convert the cryptocurrency to your local currency using a P2P exchange or a centralized exchange like Binance or Coinbase.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Crypto payment integration is built for digital creators who are looking for a more efficient and cost-effective way to get paid for their products. This includes authors, artists, course creators, software developers, and anyone else who sells digital goods online. If you're tired of dealing with PayPal holds, Gumroad payout delays, or USDT settlement speed, then crypto payment integration is worth exploring. With the right tools and expertise, you can take control of your finances and start getting paid faster and more efficiently.
USDT on Tron settles in under 60 seconds for less than one dollar in network fees.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To implement crypto payment integration, you'll need a few key components. First, you'll need a static site builder like Jekyll or Hugo that can handle JavaScript and CSS. Next, you'll need a payment gateway like NOWPayments that can process cryptocurrency payments. Finally, you'll need a wallet like MetaMask or Trust Wallet that can connect to your payment gateway and receive payments. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) is a crucial part of this setup, as it provides the frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation that makes it all work.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

So, how do you get started with crypto payment integration? First, sign up for a NOWPayments account and connect it to your wallet. Next, install Web3 Wallet Connect on your static site and generate a multi-chain QR code. Finally, promote your new payment system to your customers and start accepting cryptocurrency payments. Don't forget to set up a P2P exchange or a centralized exchange to convert your cryptocurrency to your local currency. With the right tools and expertise, you can start getting paid faster and more efficiently for your digital products.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products? To receive crypto payments, you'll need to install Web3 Wallet Connect on your static site and generate a multi-chain QR code. This code will allow buyers to scan and make a payment directly to your wallet. From there, you can convert the cryptocurrency to your local currency using a P2P exchange or a centralized exchange like Binance or Coinbase. NOWPayments is a great payment gateway to use, as it can process cryptocurrency payments and deposit them directly into your wallet.
Your revenue lands in a wallet you control — there is no payout schedule and no minimum withdrawal threshold.

Your Action Checklist

To implement crypto payment integration on your static site, follow these steps: (1) Sign up for a NOWPayments account and connect it to your wallet. (2) Install Web3 Wallet Connect on your static site and generate a multi-chain QR code. (3) Promote your new payment system to your customers and start accepting cryptocurrency payments. (4) Set up a P2P exchange or a centralized exchange to convert your cryptocurrency to your local currency. (5) Test your payment system to ensure it's working correctly. (6) Launch your payment system and start getting paid for your digital products.
The total cost of a crypto transaction for a $49 product is typically under $1.50 all-in.
